第一季 第四集 人人影视倾情奉献
纸牌屋
这是我们谈下绩效标准的筹码 It's there for leverage so that we can lock down performance standards.
你不能随便拿集体谈判当筹码 You don't toss around their right to collective bargaining like a poker chip.
我们不这么做 他们就不让步 If we don't, they won't budge.
马蒂·斯比奈拉看过了吗 Has Marty Spinella seen this?
给他看的跟这不一样 Not the version I showed him.
这么说你对他撒谎了 So you lied to his face.
不 我改变了我承诺的内容 No. I revised the parameters of my promise.
也就是撒谎 Which is lying.
是政治 Which is politics...
是你精通之道 鲍勃 the sort you're well versed in, Bob.
我来和你谈谈政治 Here's some politics for you.
我允许这个法案辩论投票 I allow this to go to the floor,
下次选举我会死无葬身之地 I get murdered next election.
这是总统的意思 This is coming from the President.
据我所知 Last time I checked,
我还是民主党人 弗兰克 I was still a Democrat, Frank,
你也是 and you were too.
你想告诉我总统不是了吗 Are you telling me the President isn't?
因为他现在表现得像个十足的共和党人 Because he's acting a hell of a lot like a Republican.
鲍勃不是我们这边的吗 I thought Bob was on our team.
让他和总统坐下来谈十分钟 Just sit him down with the President ten minutes.
集体谈判的条款不能改 We won't touch collective bargaining.
你想听我对此的意见吗 Are you interested in my advice on this,
还是只想让我传个话 or do you just want me to deliver the message?
我永远想听你的意见 弗兰克 I'm always interested in your advice, Frank.
博奇是对的 你这样会激怒很多人 Birch is right. You're going to burn a lot of bridges.
总统至少应该坐下和他谈谈 The President should at least sit down with him
让他说说他的看法 and let him make his case.
你跟鲍勃说 You tell Bob
只要他肯让法案进入辩论投票 I'm happy to schedule a meeting with the President
我就给他安排和总统的见面 once he's set a date to put this bill on the floor.
总统可以一边玩去了 The President can fuck himself.
这是党章 是他竞选的核心理念 This is the platform. It's what he ran on.
我才不在乎他的理念是什么 I don't give a shit what he ran on.
他休想压倒议会 He can't steamroll the house.
不要忘记 And don't forget,
你是为我工作 弗兰克 不是为他 you work for me, Frank, not him.
他想让法案辩论投票 If he wants something on the floor,
就必须直接来找我说 he's gonna have to talk to me directly.
我知道你很为你的家伙骄傲 鲍勃 I know you take a lot of pride in your manhood, Bob,
的确令人刮目相看 and it's impressive,
但不管你多大 but as big as it is,
琳达还是会让你吃闭门羹 Linda can still shut the door on it.
告诉瓦斯奎兹法案没戏 Tell Vasquez the bill is dead.
他不是头一次跟我来这套了 That's not the first time he's pulled that stunt on me.
也许我不该说什么 Probably should have held my tongue,
但我就是忍不住想看他萎下去的样子 but I just couldn't resist the chance to see him shrivel.
早上好 Good morning.
弗兰克 Frank.
总统先生 Mr. President.
琳达 Linda.
我们把法案中的反集体谈判条款去掉 Let's strike the anti-collective bargaining provision from the bill.
琳达和我谈过了 我认为她的观点很正确 Linda and I have talked it over, and I think she's right on this.
告诉鲍勃他可以明天下午过来 Tell Bob he can come by tomorrow afternoon.
先生 恕我冒犯 Sir, respectfully,
我认为你不该满足他的愿望 I do not think you should give him the satisfaction.
那是为什么 Well, give me a reason.
会让我们显得软弱 Makes us appear weak.
这是一个建立您权威的好机会 There's an opportunity for you to establish your supremacy.
我们应该抓住这个机会 We should seize it.
但博奇如果不合作 But without Birch's cooperation,
法案还没开始辩论投票我们就会举步维艰 we're fighting an uphill battle before we even get the bill to the floor.
弗兰克 这个我们谈过了 Frank, we discussed this.
先生 如果你现在放弃 Sir, if you give in now,
博奇在接下来的四年里 Birch will walk all over you
就会对你为所欲为 for the next four years.
我能让法案不做删减地进入辩论 I can get this bill on the house floor as is.
我保证 I promise you.
好吧 弗兰克 给我露一手吧 All right, Frank. Show me what you can do.
谢谢您 总统先生 Thank you, Mr. President.
她刚刚想窃取我的主意 That was her trying to take credit for my idea.
还是她不肯接受的建议 不可忍受 Advice she wouldn't take from me... unacceptable.
我决不允许她卖我的东西 I will not allow her to sell my goods
还不给我好处 when she cuts me out of the profits.
我明确说过不许接受采访 I specifically told her no interviews.
她违抗我的命令 She disobeyed me...
不止一次 not just once.
上个月就至少有8次 At least eight times in the past month.
她不能走 汤姆 She stays, Tom.
她不尊重我的权威 玛格丽特 She has no respect for my authority, Margaret.
我说了 她不能走 I said she stays.
我们有规则 There are rules.
做事有准则 There's a way of doing things.
如果我的记者不听… If I have a reporter who won't listen to...
两个大一女生一起搬进她们的宿舍 two freshmen girls are moving into their dorm room together.
一个来自佐治亚州 One of them's from Georgia,
另一个来自康涅狄格州 one of them's from Connecticut.
康涅狄格的女孩在帮她妈妈挂窗帘 The girl from Connecticut's helping her mother put up curtains.
佐治亚的姑娘对她们说 The girl from Georgia turns to them and says,
你们好啊 你们打哪来 "Hi. Where y'all from?"
康涅狄格州姑娘说 The girl from Connecticut says,
我们来自一个 "We're from a place where we know
句子不以介词结尾的地方 not to end a sentence with a preposition."
佐治亚的姑娘说 不好意思 The girl from Georgia says, "Oh, beg my pardon.
你们打哪来 Where y'all from...
婊子 cunt?"
以前听过吗 You heard that one before?
听过其它版本 没那么粗鲁 A version of it. With softer language.
汤姆 我们不需要循规蹈矩的人 Tom, we don't need people who follow the rules.
我们需要有个性的人 We need people with personality.
我们需要佐伊这张面孔 她的能量 We want Zoe's face, her energy.
要尽可能让她多上电视 We want to get her on TV as much as possible.
这能让我们脱颖而出 It helps us cut through the noise.
明白吗 See what I'm saying?
明白了 玛格丽特 I hear you, Margaret.
谢谢 汤姆 Thank you, Tom.
谢谢你了 Thank you.
请进 Come in.
我以为 Oh. I, uh, thought...
我本想跟伊夫林打个招呼 I wanted to say hi to Evelyn.
伊夫林 Evelyn?
这原来是她的办公室 This was her office.
我想她已经不在这儿工作了 I don't think she works here anymore.
吉莉安·科尔 Gillian Cole.
我几周前刚加入的 I came on board a couple of weeks ago.
世界之井的吉莉安吗 Gillian. World well.
是啊 Yeah.
我听过你不少好事 I've heard great things.
雷米·丹顿 Remy Danton.
你是克莱尔的同事吗 You work with Claire?
算是吧 In a way.
你好 雷米 Hello, Remy.
克莱尔 Claire.
看来你见过吉莉安了 是啊 刚刚认识 I see you've met Gillian. Yes, just now.
她在为我们做了不起的工作 She's doing fantastic work for us,
如你所见 as you can see.
红色是已完工的水井 Red is completed wells,
绿色是可能地点 green, uh, potential sites,
黄色是获得许可的 yellow approved sites,
蓝色是过滤中心 and blue are the filtration centers.
很好 你喜欢这里吗 Nice. So you liking it here?
喜欢啊 我和工作人员都喜欢 Yeah. My staff and I are loving it.
克莱尔为我们创造了许多机会 Claire's opened a lot of doors for us.
克莱尔就是这样 Sounds like Claire.
去我办公室吧 Shall we head to my office?
吉莉安 很高兴认识你 Gillian, nice to meet you.
我也是 Nice to meet you.
怎么回事 What happened?
事情变复杂了 Things got complicated.
桑科当时面临困境 San Corp was in a difficult situation.
我以为遇到困难 I would have thought you'd step up
你会出面解决 when things were difficult,
而不是拿捐款作交换条件 not hold the donation hostage.
但现在又没那么复杂了 Well, things are less complicated now.
他们又愿意捐款了 The donation is back on the table.
我被迫炒了半数员工 I had to fire half my staff.
你可以再把他们雇回来了 Now you can hire them back.
桑科愿将最初承诺金额翻倍 San Corp is prepared to double its initial commitment...
本季度一次性支付150万 1.5 million, lump sum, this quarter.
为什么 和之前一样 公关 Why? Public relations. Same as before.
他们想从弗兰西斯那里得到什么 And what do they want from Francis?
我们跟弗兰克都扯平了 Things are square with Frank.
我们只谈净水计划的事 We're only talking about the C.W.I.
但为什么要翻倍 But why double it?
因为我说服了他们 Because I said they should.
他们给的越多 你们能做的也越多 The more they give, the more you can do.
你们做的越多 他们就越有面子 The more you can do, the better they look.
他们雇格兰顿-希尔 And that's why they hired Glendon Hill...
就是为了撑门面 to make them look good.
他们还雇你在国会拉拢人 And they also hired you to get traction in congress.
这次不同 Not in this case.
我们想建立长期合作关系 克莱尔 We want a long-term partnership, Claire.
这是对未来的投资 This is an investment in the future.
我们没有其它要求 We're not attaching strings.
我会考虑的 I'll think about it.
他们希望能尽快落实 They'd really love to move quickly on this.
我说了我会考虑的 I said I'll think about it.
玛德琳 你得把这个发过来 Madeleine, you have to email me this shit.
我需要书面文件 I need it in writing.
而且还有一个多小时呢 And with more than an hour's notice.
是啊 我知道 Yeah, I know that,
但你得理解 我们有计划的 but you have to understand we... we have a plan.
我们做事有自己的方法 We have a way that we do this,
如果你… and when you...
好吧 Okay.
好 Fine.
嗯 再见 Yeah. Yeah. Bye.
玛德琳临时起意 Madeleine has decided to have
要跟她在交友网上认识的男友 a spur-of-the-moment trip to Orlando with her
去奥兰多旅行 latest eHarmony catch.
不事先通知 都不说一声 No heads-up, no warning.
孩子们呢 The kids?
他们两点半放学 They get out of school at 2:30.
我可以去和船厂的人会面 I can do the shipbuilders meeting.
真的 You sure?
是的 只是个公共事务小组而已 Yeah, it's just a public affairs team.
回头我向你报告 你明天再打给他们 I'll brief you, and then you can call them tomorrow.
你去接孩子吧 Go get your kids.
雷米今天早上去过我办公室 Remy came by this morning. To the office.
他想干什么 What does he want?
捐款的事又有门了 The donation's back on the table.
数额翻了一番 有150万 They've doubled it to 1.5 million.
你回绝了吧 没有 You said no, right? I didn't.
他并不图你任何回报 弗兰西斯 He doesn't want anything from you, Francis.
得了吧 克莱尔 你这还不懂吗 Come on, Claire. You know better than that.
我特意问过的 I specifically asked.
也许他现在不求回报 Maybe not right now,
他是我一手提拔的 but look, I invented this guy, all right?
迈出这一步就刹不住了 It's a slippery slope. You...
想想有了这笔钱我能做多少事 Think of what I can do with this money.
我能把辞退的职员全部请回来 I can hire back the people I let go.
还能加快吉莉安那些项目的 I can help accelerate the funding for the projects
融资进度 that Gillian has brought in.
资金的事我们可以另想办法 Let's find another way to raise the money.
但这笔钱唾手可得 But it's right there at my feet.
克莱尔 我现在已经百事缠身了 Claire, I have too much on my plate right now.
不能再被桑科公司纠缠上 I can't have San corp breathing down my neck again.
我不能让雷米 I can't have Remy...
那是雷米啊 Look, it is Remy.
他太了解我了 这很危险 He knows me too well. It's dangerous.
要顾全大局 Look at the bigger picture here.
我恳求你 I'm asking.
你这不是恳求 No. You're not.
克莱尔 Claire.
我会用回复他的话答复你 I'll tell you what I told him.
你说 Which was?
我会考虑的 I'll think about it.
我知道最近我们有些紧张 I know there's been some tension,
而且我应该负主要责任 and I'm probably more to blame than you are.
但过去的事就让它过去吧 But I'd like to put that behind us.
佐伊 Zoe,
你将成为我们新一任驻白宫记者 you're going to be our new White House correspondent.
那简宁呢 What about Janine?
升任中西部总编辑 I promoted her to Midwest Bureau chief.
她同意了吗 She's okay with that?
她舍得放弃白宫的工作 She wants to give up the White House?
这是我的决定 It's the decision I've made.
可简宁毕竟经验丰富 It's just that Janine has so much experience.
我还以为你会很兴奋呢 I thought you'd be more excited about this.
抱歉 我还以为你叫我进来是要 I'm sorry. I... I just thought you brought me in here to...
我不知道 I don't know.
解雇你 To fire you.
也许吧 Maybe.
都过去了 Water under the bridge.
我们要重新开始 We're starting over.
那么 你准备好了吗 So are you ready to take this on?
我能考虑一下吗 Can I think about it?
有一份白宫的工作摆在面前 People usually don't have to think about it
人们一般不用考虑的 佐伊 when they're offered the White House, Zoe.
只要一两天就好 Just a day or two.
简宁将乘周五的航班飞往芝加哥 Janine is booked for a flight to Chicago on Friday.
我会在那之前回复你 I'll let you know before then.
我只是要 I just need to...
谢谢你 汤姆 Thank you. Thank you, Tom.
戴维·拉斯姆森是多数党领袖 David Rasmussen is the majority leader,
也就是说他的职位在我之上 which means he's one step above me
在博奇之下 and one below Birch,
就像夹在一匹饿极的狼 which is akin to being between a very hungry wolf
和一只好斗的羊之间 and a very quarrelsome sheep.
羊群或是狼群 看看他会选择哪一边 Let's see if he stays with the herd or joins the pack.
戴维 不介意我坐这儿吧 David. You mind if I join you?
请坐 就吃色拉啊 Please. A salad, huh?
是啊 我想好好照顾自己 Yes. I'm trying to take better care of myself.
不错嘛 节食吗 Good man. Diet?
节食 锻炼 各种方法 Diet, exercise, everything.
你也该照顾好自己 You ought to take better care of yourself too.
他们这儿的披萨实在太美味了 Well, they should stop serving such good pizza.
我不是指饮食 Oh, I'm not talking about the food.
我是指博奇 I'm talking about Birch.
你要想当上议长 You are never going to be speaker
就必须得有所行动 unless you do something about it.
我对自己的位置很满意 I'm very satisfied where I am.
拜托 就目前来说 确实满意 Oh, come on. For the time being, yeah.
一时就是永远 Time being never.
你想成为议长 The only way you become Speaker
只有可能是博奇落选或退休 is if Birch loses his district or retires,
在你我老到要装假牙之前 neither of which is going to happen
这两种情况都不会发生 before you and I have dentures.
我不喜欢你这番话的势头 弗兰克 I'm not happy where this conversation is going, Frank.
你想做议长 我知道你想 If you want it, and I know you do,
我有个办法 there's a way.
好了 我不能… Okay. Right. I can't...
票数过半就可以 也就是218票 all you need is a simple majority... 218 votes.
我们在共和党能得到205票 We're going to get at least 205 out of the G.O.P.,
这样 再有民主党13票就行 and after that, all you need is 13 Democrats.
你我手里就有两票 You and I make two.
你疯了吗 Are you out of your mind?
稍稍考虑一下吧 Just consider it for a moment.
你想和共和党串通 You want to collude with the Republicans?
我不想 I don't want to,
但如果能让你当上议长 我会的 but I would if you become Speaker in the process.
这种事没有先例 Never been done before.
凡事都有第一次 There's a first time for everything.
这太荒谬了 This is ridiculous.
共和党会很乐意杀杀鲍勃的威风 The Republicans would love a chance to knock Bob down a peg or two.
而你想帮他们 And you want to help them.
我想帮我们 I want to help us.
鲍勃不会和白宫合作 Bob will not play ball with the White House.
你是个通情达理的人 戴维 他不是 Now, you're a reasonable man, David, and he's not.
你知道我是什么人吗 You know what I am?
我是个谨慎的人 I'm a discreet man.
所以算你走运 You're lucky for that.
我不会跟鲍勃说今天的事 I'm not going to mention this to Bob,
你要是再提 but if you ever bring it up again,
我就没办法了 I won't have a choice.
看来他选择了羊群 Looks like he opted for the herd.
克莱尔 Claire.
我想为南苏丹项目的 I'd like to put an order for the water filters
滤水器和钻井机械下订单 and the well-digging equipment for the South Sudan project.
我们能讨论一下预算问题吗 Can we talk about the budget?
需要多少 20万 How much? 200,000.
一个项目就要这么多 For one project?
我知道很多 I know it's a lot,
但这是我们在非洲的旗舰项目 but it'll be our flagship project in Africa,
我们也是那里首家 and we would be the first organization there
有如此规模的机构 to work on this scale.
我想先核对一下详情 I'd like to go over the specifics first.
我已经做好了预算表 I have the budget right here.
我先查一下留言 就去找你 Let me just grab my messages, and then I'll come in to you.
好 我在办公室等你 Okay. I'll be in my office.
我不在时有电话打来吗 Any calls while I was out?
都放你桌上了 这个是快递送来的 They're on the desk, and this came by messenger.
克莱尔 你不需要桑科 你有我呢 弗兰克
亚当 我是克莱尔 Adam. It's Claire.
对 我知道 是这样 Yes. I know. It has.
没事 只是想你了 No reason. I was just thinking about you.
你说得对 是谎话 You're right. It is a lie.
我确实有事 I do have a reason.
我需要你 I need to use you.
白宫就是新闻死掉的地方 The White House is where news goes to die.
净是些陈词滥调 Everything's canned.
那些精心编排的讲话… These perfectly prepared statements...
那是份威风的工作 佐伊 it's a prestigious job, Zoe.
我九年级的时候是这样的 Used to be, when I was in ninth grade.
现在就是块墓地 Now it's a graveyard.
现在唯一还算有意思的事 The only halfway interesting thing they do
就是每年一度的晚宴 is throw a big dinner party once a year
他们不是自我吹捧 where they pat themselves on the back
就是跟明星勾肩搭背 and rub shoulders with movie stars.
谁要看那个 Who needs that?
从你到这里开始 Every day since you started here,
每天都在求我给你升职 而现在… you've begged me to move you up, and now...
我的人生理想 My goal in life is not
不是在《先驱报》一步步爬到 to climb up the Herald's ladder one rung at a time
我能有自己的文具 until I've got my own stationery.
我们有些人很珍惜在这样一家报社的发展 Some of us value a career at a paper like this.
抱歉 我不是那个意思… I'm sorry. I didn't mean for that to come off...
但就是这个感觉 而且你已经跳级了 Well, it did, and you skipped a few rungs, by the way.
想怎么做随便你 佐伊 Do what you want to do, Zoe,
但你要是希望我能给你鼓劲 but if you want me to be your cheerleader and say,
说"推掉它" 我做不到 "Yeah, turn it down," I won't.
我刚来这里时 会为那份工作拼命 I would have killed for that job when I first started here.
113届国会 美国众议院
把菲柯特放在"倾向赞成"里 Put Fichtner in the "Leaning yes" Column.
你不觉得他是中立的吗 Don't you think he's a neutral?
他讨厌博奇 He hates Birch.
是 但他能在财政委员会任职还靠博奇 Yeah, but he owes Birch for the ways and means appointment.
把他放在"中立"里 还有谁 Put him in "Neutral." Who else?
众议院投票计数
雷米兹是中立的吗 Ramirez is a neutral?
这个表格太不可靠了 Oh, this list is so shaky.
他们要是有谁跟鲍勃通了气… Any one of them leaks it to Bob...
不 我们只需要一个人 No, what we need is one name,
一个能说动12个人的人 one person who can deliver 12.
黑人党团 The black caucus.
乌麦克 Womack.
我们给他什么好处 What can we offer him?
他需要什么 What does he need?

每年美国国会议员们会提交很多提案 但只有少数能进入立法程序 国会里的议员影响力天差地别 而议长能做最终的定夺 本集开篇部分 卫生间对话提到的platform特指一个党的核心思想 美国四年一次的党全国代表大会 主要是提名选举本党总统候选人 同时也通过一个包含中心思想的platform 相当于我国的党章 民主党重视教育 所以教育改革应该是民主党章程的内容之一

本集还提到黑人党团 国会议员会根据自己的背景组成小团体 在投票的时候一起行动 如黑人党团 拉丁裔党团等等 佐伊与卢卡斯对话中提到的big dinner party 是指一年一度的"The White House correspondents dinner" 驻白宫记者晚宴 一般在四五月份 由驻白宫记者协会主办 总统会参加 并在会上讲话 主要是讲笑话 还会请一位嘉宾 一般是比较知名的脱口秀主持人 也要讲笑话 晚宴每年都会吸引很多注意
